title: X(g) / Y(g) segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geoms (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, g TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE nodes (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, g TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO nodes (id, g) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'POINT(3 3)');

SELECT CAST(substr(g, instr(g, '(') + 1, instr(g, ' ') - instr(g, '(') - 1) AS REAL) AS x FROM geoms UNION SELECT CAST(substr(g, instr(g, '(') + 1, instr(g, ' ') - instr(g, '(') - 1) AS REAL) AS y FROM nodes WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: selecting X(g) or Y(g) from geometry tables
